title: 24 Tins Play Color Dough Modelling Set 24Colours Modelling Clay Set, Plasticine Modelling Clay for Kids, Multicolour Playdough, Coloured Clay Plasticine for Kids' Arts and Crafts, 50g/Tins
features: MULTIPLE COLOURS TO CHOOSE FROM: This Dough playset includes 24 reusable 50g jars (1.76 oz) of soft, non-toxic modeling clay in bold, bright hues, perfect for imaginative play for 3-year-old boys and girls who love modelling clay.【When to clean, allow to dry, then scrape or vacuum. Molded results vary depending on child’s age and level of skill.】

RELIABLE QUALITY: Made with flour, salt, and water, this eco-friendly clay is rigorously tested for safety, making them ideal for anyone who loves modelling clay (contains wheat) is the best choice for children who love arts and crafts.

DURABLE & AIRTIGHT STORAGE: Each jar features a secure, resealable lid to keep clay fresh and pliable for repeated use, reducing waste and maximizing playtime value. Ideal for gifts, classrooms, or restocking supplies!
BOOST CREATIVITY & MOTOR SKILLS: Encourages color mixing, shaping, and imaginative play while helping kids develop fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and artistic expression.

CREATIVE DOUGH TOYS: Shape, squish, mix, and make it all! Ultimate Colorful Creativity Kit 24 jars of Vibrant Dough Cans for Endless Fun! Ideal for classroom prizes, creative group activities, birthdays, holidays, children's stocking stuffers, trick-or-treating toys, children's party favours etc.
